text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #10)
I think I took HEAD back when I made the patch, the exact revision is
https://github.com/calf-studio-gear/calf/commit/648f05e85287cf08af198bdd9e52baba95b502ec

But there's some library change, I had to change the patches to make it build. The full patch I'm using successfully since summer is attached to bug #258051
